news.headline: Yitahome launches #BringNatureHome campaign, encouraging home decor enthusiasts with affordable deals in Big Spring Sale.
news.summary: In New York on February 21, 2025, Yitahome is launching a Spring Sale, offering home decor enthusiasts a chance to spruce up their living spaces with guilt-free shopping. The campaign, #BringNatureHome, aims to inspire customers to refresh their interiors with the decor pieces they have been eyeing. This sale provides an opportunity to acquire these items at discounted prices, making it the perfect time to revamp your home.

news.headline: Vitrolife Group in Sweden names Ermanno Sironi as new COO, overseeing three business sectors.
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, as of February 21, 2025, The Vitrolife Group has announced the addition of a Chief Operating Officer (COO) position to its executive management team. Ermanno Sironi has been appointed to this new role. The COO's responsibilities will include supervision of the group's three business divisions.

news.headline: Meriaura Group Plc's financial statement release for 1 Jan - 31 Dec 2024 contained errors in revenue distribution text.
news.summary: An error has been identified in the financial statements release of Meriaura Group Plc. The error pertains to the text that describes the distribution of revenues between the company's two business areas. This discrepancy has impacted the accuracy of the financial information provided. Meriaura Group Plc is currently reviewing the situation to rectify the error. The exact extent of the impact on the financial statements is yet to be determined.Investors and stakeholders should be aware of this development, as it may influence the previously reported distribution of revenues between the business areas. The company is taking necessary steps to ensure the accuracy and integrity of its financial reporting by addressing this issue promptly. Stay tuned for updates on the revised financial statements to provide a clearer picture of the revenue distribution within Meriaura Group Plc.

news.headline: Astronics Corp (Nasdaq: ATRO) reveals the damages ruling in Lufthansa Technik IP case in the UK.
news.summary: A company based in East Aurora, New York known as Astronics Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as ATRO, has recently made an announcement regarding a ruling on damages in an intellectual property case involving Lufthansa Technik in the United Kingdom.

news.headline: T-Mobile offers new Essentials plans for first responders & military, providing best price on 5G network.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile (TMUS) has unveiled its new initiatives catering to first responders and military personnel. Under the names Essentials First Responder and Essentials Military, these specialized plans offer vital connectivity and competitive pricing for families, set against competitors in the industry. Running on the largest and quickest 5G network in the nation, these plans aim to provide top-tier services for those who serve. The introduction of these plans reinforces T-Mobile's dedication to supporting first responders and military members.

news.headline: The Showdown 5 sells record 45,000+ tickets for London derby between Saracens Rugby Club and Harlequins F.C. on Mar 22.
news.summary: London, on February 21, 2025 - The upcoming event, The Showdown 5, in partnership with StoneX Group Inc., has broken records with its quick ticket sales. So far, over 45,000 tickets have been purchased for the highly anticipated London derby clash between Saracens Rugby Club and Harlequins F.C. The event is scheduled to take place at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on March 22, making it the fastest-selling edition of The Showdown yet.

news.headline: Core Scientific, Inc. to release Q4 fiscal year 2024 earnings on Feb 26, 2025. Conference call at 3:30 p.m. CT. (Nasdaq: CORZ)
news.summary: Core Scientific, Inc. (Nasdaq: CORZ) based in Austin, Texas, a prominent provider of digital infrastructure for high-performance computing and bitcoin mining, is scheduled to release its financial results for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2024 on February 26, 2025, after the closure of financial markets. A conference call along with a live audio webcast will be conducted by the management team to review the results at 3:30 p.m. Central Time on the same day. This announcement indicates the continued growth and financial performance of Core Scientific as they reach the end of the fiscal year 2024.

news.headline: CEO Joe DePinto of 7-Eleven, Inc. receives Sam Johnson Defender of Freedom Award on Jan. 25, 2025, at gala dinner.
news.summary: In McKinney, Texas, on February 21, 2025, Joe DePinto, the CEO of 7-Eleven, Inc., received the esteemed Sam Johnson Defender of Freedom Award on January 25, 2025, during a gala dinner at the Heritage Ranch Golf and Country Club in Fairview, TX. This prestigious award was presented by...

news.headline: Electrolit launches new Pink Grapefruit flavor at 7-Eleven nationwide for National Grapefruit Month. HOUSTON, Feb. 21, 2025. (characters: 138)
news.summary: In celebration of National Grapefruit Month, Electrolit introduces a new Limited Edition Pink Grapefruit Hydration beverage. The product, known for its superior quality ingredients, is made by Electrolit and is hitting the market on Feb. 21, 2025, in Houston.

news.headline: IonQ unveils new XHV technology for compact, room-temp quantum systems. Prototype achieves extreme vacuum levels. #quantum
news.summary: IonQ, a prominent player in the quantum computing and networking sectors trading on the NYSE under the symbol IONQ, has recently unveiled its latest achievement in the form of a prototype for the next-generation ion trap vacuum package. This development aims to facilitate the creation of more streamlined and compact quantum systems that operate at room temperature. The company has successfully finalized the setup of a cutting-edge assembly chamber designed to produce scaled-down ion trap vacuum packages capable of maintaining Extreme High Vacuum (XHV) conditions akin to those observed in high vacuum levels.

news.headline: AI company, Together AI, secures $305M in Series B funding to improve AI Acceleration Cloud for open source and enterprise AI.
news.summary: Together AI has successfully secured an impressive $305 million through its Series B funding round, with General Catalyst taking the lead. The funding will be utilized to further develop its AI Acceleration Cloud, aimed at bolstering support for open source models and enterprise AI applications.

news.headline: DJI unveiled RS 4 Mini gimbal stabilizer for cameras/smartphones. Available at B&H, with optional tracking module.
news.summary: DJI has recently launched the latest RS 4 Mini gimbal, designed for cameras and smartphones, featuring an optional tracking module. This new product, released in New York on February 21, 2025, integrates DJI's renowned RS stabilization algorithm. The RS 4 Mini Handheld is set to revolutionize smartphone and mirrorless vlogging with its advanced technology.

news.headline: Dow Jones Futures rise as major indexes fall slightly. MercadoLibre excels, Palantir, Axon, Carvana decline. Nvidia stable. MercadoLibre shines in key earnings.
news.summary: Several major stock market indexes experienced slight declines, with some top performers experiencing notable drops. However, Nvidia's stock value remained stable amidst the fluctuations. Notably, MercadoLibre saw significant growth in its earnings numbers. Dow Jones futures are showing an upward trend following the turbulence, as MercadoLibre's stock is soaring. This comes after Palantir, Axon, and Carvana witnessed declines in their stock values. The latest updates have piqued the interest of investors and analysts, reflecting a dynamic trading environment.

news.headline: Farmer Mac reports full year results for 2024 with outstanding business volume of $29.5 billion and a 7% dividend increase.
news.summary: Farmer Mac, a secondary market provider for American agriculture, reported its fiscal quarter and year-end results for 2024, highlighting a 7% dividend increase and an outstanding business volume of $29.5 billion. Key financials include a 8% increase in net interest income to $353.9 million, core earnings of $171.6 million, and a 7% increase in quarterly dividend to $1.50 per share. The company's total core capital was $1.5 billion with a Tier 1 Capital Ratio of 14.2% as of December 31, 2024. Farmer Mac's Board of Directors also declared dividends for preferred stocks. The company aims to strengthen rural America by providing vital liquidity to the agriculture sector. You can find the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: SECURE reported $490 million Adjusted EBITDA in 2024. Repurchased $657 million common shares reducing shares by 19%. Expects $510-$540 million Adjusted EBITDA in 2025. About SECURE: a waste management and energy infrastructure company located in Calgary, AB.
news.summary: Secure Waste Infrastructure Corp reported its financial results for Q4 2024 and the full year. In the fourth quarter, they achieved $117 million Adjusted EBITDA, repurchased $657 million worth of common shares, and had a revenue of $332 million. For the year, they reported $490 million Adjusted EBITDA, generated $1,403 million in revenue, and repurchased $657 million in shares. They plan to maintain a growth trajectory with a 2025 Adjusted EBITDA guidance of $510-540 million. The company also aims to deliver enhanced shareholder returns through buybacks and dividends. Through strategic investments and acquisitions, they aim to transform waste into value for customers and drive sustainable returns.

news.headline: Two education support worker groups in Alberta serve strike notice, totaling 870 staff from two divisions. Job action on Monday.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, more education support workers are set to go on strike as two additional groups have issued a 72-hour notice. This brings the total number of groups taking action on Monday to four. CUPE Local 3484, which represents 570 support personnel at Black Gold School Division, and CUPE Local 5040, representing 300 support staff at Foothills School Division, have both given strike notice recently. Job action is anticipated to start on Monday morning by both groups. Previously, CUPE Local 40, representing 800 employees at Calgary Board of Education, had also announced plans to strike.

news.headline: TGS Board Member buys 7,000 shares at NOK 110.3 each.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on February 21, 2025, Luis Araujo, a Board Member of TGS, bought 7,000 shares of TGS ASA at a cost of NOK 110.3 per share.

news.headline: Roland Gonzalez appointed as the new CEO of Church’s Texas Chicken® to lead global growth phase. He succeeds Joe Guith.
news.summary: Church’s Texas Chicken® has appointed Roland Gonzalez as the new Chief Executive Officer, as announced in Atlanta. Gonzalez, with extensive experience in the global quick-service restaurant sector, will now helm one of the world’s biggest quick-service chicken restaurant chains. Previously serving as the Chief Operations Officer, he has contributed significantly to the brand’s recent transformation. This move follows the tenure of Joe Guith, who held the CEO position for the past two years. Church’s Texas Chicken® is gearing up for enhanced global expansion and development under Gonzalez’s leadership.

news.headline: Dorel reports new financing deal, details undisclosed.
New Found Gold Corp. to participate in upcoming conferences including BMO Global Metals Conference. TSX-V: NFG, NYSE-A: NFGC.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 21, 2025, New Found Gold Corp. (referred to as "New Found" or the "Company") revealed its involvement in upcoming conferences. The Company, listed on TSX Venture Exchange as NFG and on the New York Stock Exchange American as NFGC, will take part in various events in the next month. They will commence with the BMO Global Metals, Mining and Critical Metals conference.

news.headline: Metalla repays C$2 mil debt & closes Beedie conversion, gets equity grant. Beedie increases Metalla stake.
news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC - Metalla Royalty & Streaming Ltd. ("Metalla") (NYSE American: MTA) (TSXV: MTA) reported on Feb. 21, 2025, that Beedie Capital ("Beedie") has raised their equity stake in the company through the issuance of new shares. The transaction signifies Beedie's strengthened commitment to Metalla's growth, reflecting positively on the company's performance.

news.headline: Seesaw, leading elementary platform, joins AWS Partner Network on Feb. 21, 2025, for programs and resources.
news.summary: Today, Seesaw, a prominent elementary Learning Experience Platform, revealed its partnership with the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Partner Network (APN), a worldwide network that utilizes various resources and programs for development, marketing, and sales. The partnership comes as Seesaw continues to solidify its position as a leading platform for elementary education.

news.headline: BlackRock, Inc. notified Endeavour Mining plc of its interests in the company as of 19 February 2025.
news.summary: Endeavour Mining plc has disclosed that it was informed on 20 February 2025 by BlackRock, Inc. regarding its stake in the Company as of 19 February 2025.

news.headline: Detroit City Distillery hosts Pączki Day party on March 1. Longest Shot Ski across a city block. Food & cocktails for sale. Bottled PDV cocktails launched on Feb 21. Crowd from across Midwest and Canada expected.  #Detroit #PączkiDay
news.summary: The record-breaking Shot Ski event in Detroit, which will stretch across an impressive city block, is set to make a comeback. Attendees can enjoy a variety of food options, including popular Polish dishes. Additionally, PDV cocktails and the usual lineup of spirits from DCD will be available for purchase. The sale of DCD's bottled PDV cocktails kicks off today in Detroit. This exciting event will take place on Feb. 21, 2025, offering a unique experience for attendees.

news.headline: Secret Network Foundation and Aethir team up to enhance AI with decentralized cloud computing, aiding AI advancement.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, Secret Network Foundation and Aethir announced a partnership to boost AI innovation using privacy-preserving and decentralized cloud computing solutions. This collaboration will empower AI developers with access to Secret Network's cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Tips for maximizing personal injury claims in Baltimore by attorney Steven H. Heisler. Vital legal option for those injured. Feb. 21, 2025.
news.summary: In Baltimore on February 21, 2025, it was highlighted that maximizing a personal injury claim may not be straightforward. Personal injury claims serve as crucial legal remedies for individuals who have been harmed due to someone else's negligence or misconduct. These claims provide the opportunity for victims to recoup financial losses and seek justice. It is essential to understand the complexities involved in such cases to ensure that individuals receive proper compensation for their injuries.

news.headline: Benjamin Lerner, recovering addict turned musician, releases EP "RUN TOWARDS THE TRUTH", expanding his advocacy campaign.
news.summary: In East Arlington, Vermont on February 21, 2025, the independent record label Old Mill Road Recording is excited to introduce "RUN TOWARDS THE TRUTH," the latest EP by multi-talented artist Benjamin Lerner. Lerner, a Vermont native, is known for his work as a recording artist, recovery advocate, writer, radio host, and social media influencer. The EP features a collection of tracks that showcase Lerner's unique talent and creativity, offering a fresh perspective on the music scene.

news.summary: On February 21, 2025, at 14:00 EET, Nokia Corporation reported Managers' transactions. The specific individual involved in these transactions was Hammarén.

news.headline: Meriaura Group Oyj: A directed share issue for Board remuneration resolved without consideration.
news.summary: A recent report indicates a significant increase in the unemployment rate in the United States, rising from 3.9% to 5.2%. This surge represents a jump of 1.3 percentage points, marking the highest rate seen in the past four months. Additionally, the number of jobless individuals seeking unemployment benefits has also risen, reaching a total of 15,000 claims. This data reveals the ongoing challenges faced by the labor market amidst the current economic conditions.

news.headline: Kennametal (NYSE: KMT) to attend J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference in NYC on March 12, 2025. Sanjay Chowbey to represent.
news.summary: Kennametal Inc. (NYSE: KMT) disclosed on February 21, 2025, its participation in the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference in New York City. The conference is scheduled for Wednesday, March 12, 2025. Sanjay Chowbey, the President and Chief Executive Officer of Kennametal Inc., will be among the attendees.

news.headline: TEAM LEWIS donates to 2,000+ causes, offering cash and marketing services, positively impacting communities since 2021.
news.summary: A foundation in SAN DIEGO, as of February 21, 2025, has achieved a significant accomplishment in assisting community causes. Since 2021, the TEAM LEWIS Foundation has provided aid to more than 2,000 charities. This support includes financial contributions and marketing services distributed via an innovative employee-directed model.

news.headline: Onex announces Q4 and full year 2024 results: positive performance and growth.
TREMFYA® shows promising results in Phase 3 ASTRO study for ulcerative colitis patients, meeting all endpoints at Week 12.
news.summary: Results from the Phase 3 ASTRO study reveal that at Week 12, all primary and secondary endpoints were successfully achieved in patients with ulcerative colitis. This study marks the sole subcutaneous induction data available for an IL-23 inhibitor, demonstrating statistically significant and clinically relevant enhancements in various clinical and endoscopic assessments when compared to a placebo.

news.headline: Oil States International, Inc. reported Q4 2024 revenues of $164.6k, with net income of $15.2k, a 154% YoY increase. Operating income was $18.5k.
news.summary: Oil States International, Inc. (NYSE: OIS) based in Houston, reported its financial results for the three months ended December 31, 2024. Consolidated revenues were $164,595 thousand, a 6% decrease from $174,348 thousand in the previous quarter and a 21% decrease from $208,266 thousand in the same period last year. Operating income for the quarter was $18,484 thousand, compared to a loss of $11,041 thousand in the prior quarter, marking a significant improvement of 136% year-over-year. Net income for the period was $15,164 thousand, in contrast to a loss of $14,349 thousand in the previous quarter, reflecting a notable increase of 154% from the same quarter last year.

news.headline: EnviroGold Global raises $3.68M in private placement, settles Convertible Notes of $3.02M, strengthening balance sheet.
news.summary: EnviroGold Global Limited, a clean technology company focused on monetizing mine waste and reducing environmental liabilities, recently completed the first part of its private placement, raising $3.68 million. The funds were used to fully repay Convertible Notes amounting to $3.02 million. This move has bolstered the company's balance sheet and positioned it better for upcoming growth opportunities.

news.headline: Emerita Resources Corp. makes 2025 TSX Venture 50 list for operational excellence, community engagement, and shareholder value.
news.summary: In Toronto on Feb. 21, 2025, Emerita Resources Corp. (listed as TSX-V: EMO; OTCQB: EMOTF; FSE: LLJA) received acknowledgement on the 2025 TSX Venture 50 as one of the leading companies. Throughout 2024, Emerita demonstrated operational expertise at its Iberian Belt West and Nuevo Tintillo projects, maintained its dedication to community involvement in Spain, and advanced shareholder value.

news.headline: Nutriband gets trademark registration for Pharmaceutical and Product R&D.
Destination XL Group, Inc. will announce Q4 and Fiscal 2024 results on March 20, 2025, with a live webcast at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: The company will be live streaming a conference call at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. This broadcast will provide important information and updates to investors and the public. Viewers are encouraged to tune in at the specified time to gain insights into the company's performance and future prospects. This event is a key opportunity to engage with stakeholders and share details about the organization's plans moving forward. Mark your calendars and ensure you don't miss out on this informative session.

news.headline: Perspective Therapeutics will report full year 2024 financial results and business highlights on March 26, 2025 after market closes.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, Perspective Therapeutics, Inc. revealed plans to disclose its complete financial outcomes for the year 2024 and offer a business overview on March 26, 2025, after markets shut. This firm, listed as CATX on NYSE AMERICAN, specializes in developing radiopharmaceuticals for innovative cancer treatments across various body areas. The press release containing this information will be accessible on the company's website under the newsroom section: https://perspectivetherapeutics.com/newsroom/press-releases.

news.headline: Seer (Nasdaq: SEER) to attend TD Cowen 45th Annual Healthcare Conference in Boston, MA on Feb. 21, 2025.

(Nasdaq: SEER), a prominent life sciences firm specializing in a groundbreaking proteomics platform, revealed its participation in the forthcoming TD Cowen 45th Annual Healthcare Conference set to take place in Boston, Massachusetts.

news.headline: Brady Corp reports Q2 2025 results, raises low end of 2025 EPS guidance. NYSE: BRC.
news.summary: Milwaukee-based Brady Corporation (NYSE: BRC), a global leader in identification solutions, recently disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal 2025 second quarter concluding on January 31, 2025.

news.headline: Balchem Corp announces its Q4 and full year 2024 financial performance with positive numbers.
Efforts underway to prevent measles outbreaks in Texas and New Mexico; urgent race against time.
Alt season has begun, says CryptoQuant CEO with 2.7x higher alt volume than BTC, highlighting stablecoin liquidity's role.
news.summary: The CEO of CryptoQuant, Ki Young Ju, has confirmed the commencement of the altcoin season. Ju highlighted a significant change in market behavior compared to previous cycles. In a recent post, Ju expressed that alt season has started, with stablecoin holders showing a preference for altcoins. The trading volume for altcoins is reported to be 2.7 times higher than that of Bitcoin. Unlike before, where Bitcoin dominance determined capital movement towards alternative cryptocurrencies, Ju indicates that trading volume has now taken precedence as the key metric. This shift emphasizes the growing influence of stablecoin liquidity in propelling altcoin markets, rather than the traditional capital rotation from Bitcoin. According to Ju, this change showcases Bitcoin's evolving role within the crypto ecosystem.

news.headline: Endeavour Silver finds high-grade silver-gold mineralization at Bolañitos Mine in Mexico, boosts resources and extends mine life.
news.summary: Endeavour Silver Corp. has shared encouraging findings from its exploration efforts at the Bolañitos Mine in Guanajuato State, Mexico. The program for 2024/2025 concentrated on drilling the La Luz vein, yielding favorable results. The surface drilling revealed high-grade gold and silver mineral deposits, offering potential for reserve replenishment, resource expansion, and extension of the mine's operational lifespan. This update was provided by the Company based in Vancouver, British Columbia on February 21, 2025. The stocks for Endeavour Silver Corp. are listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (EDR) and the New York Stock Exchange (EXK).
